zh.lifeSummary: 當Barbara Zimmerman於1613年5月17日出生在德國海因里希_維斯普斯多伊奇 可洛卡爾茲盧時，她的父親Michael Zimmermann61歲，母親Anna Ernst57歲。她於大約1630年與Martin Pfattheicher在德國巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧史額可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1675年10月26日在德國巴登-爾特波格卡爾茲盧卡爾茲盧享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Barbara Zimmerman于1613年5月17日出生在德国海因里希_維斯普斯多伊奇 可洛卡爾茲盧时，她的父亲Michael Zimmermann61岁，母亲Anna Ernst57岁。她于大约1630年与Martin Pfattheicher在德国巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧史額可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1675年10月26日在德国巴登-爾特波格卡爾茲盧卡爾茲盧享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Zimmerman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Zimmermann  , and a variant of the same Jewish (Ashkenazic) surname.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Barbara Zimmerman was born on 17 May 1613, in Karlsruhe, Deutsch Krone, West Prussia, Prussia, Germany, her father, Michael Zimmermann, was 61 and her mother, Anna Ernst, was 57. She married Martin Pfattheicher about 1630, in Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 26 October 1675, in Karlsruhe, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 62.

Elle a épousé Martin Pfattheicher environ 1630, à Spöck, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1675, à Karlsruhe, Karlsruhe, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Barbara Zimmerman(이)가 1613년 5월 17일 독일 프레우ss 웨스트프레우ss 데우츠치 크론 칼스루헤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Michael Zimmermann(은)는 61세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Ernst(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 대략 1630년 독일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스poc크에서 Martin Pfattheicher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1675년 10월 26일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 칼스루헤 칼스루헤에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Barbara Zimmerman родилась 17 мая 1613 г. в местности карлсрух, деуцч кроун, вестпреуssен, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Michael Zimmermann было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Anna Ernst, 57. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Martin Pfattheicher около 1630 г. в местности спoкк, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 26 октября 1675 г. в местности карлсрух, карлсрух, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 62 лет.
